sub_mechanisms: M_1: gather full gradient at step
M_2: Steiner-style symmetrize the gradient about a learned hyperplane
M_3: project the symmetrized gradient onto a stored null-space basis
M_4: apply update preserving the rearrangement invariant
stripped_llm_application: Optimizer applies a measure-preserving rearrangement to the gradient about a learned hyperplane (M_2), then projects the symmetrized result onto a stored null-space basis (M_3) before applying the update; the rearrangement-projection composition is intended to preserve a level-set invariant.
novelty_claim_stripped: GaLore/Lotus/GNSP/LoRA-Null project gradients into low-rank/null-space subspaces but do not first apply a measure-preserving rearrangement. The rearrangement-then-project composition is new.
